Specialized in JavaScript, Vue.js, and React, I combine technical excellence with a strong design sensibility to craft high-value, tailor-made digital experiences.

services.title: My services
services.description: I offer a wide range of Web Development and Web Design services, including showcase websites, e-commerce solutions, web applications, UI/UX design, illustrations and social media visuals. Below is an overview of my process :
services.inquiryDescription: Please fill out the inquiry form below. I will get back to you promptly with a questionnaire to better understand your project and needs.
services.consultationDescription: If the project aligns with your needs and my expertise, we’ll schedule a call to discuss it in more detail. You’ll then be given access to a client portal containing the contract and development plan.

process.title: A clear & collaborative process
process.description: A dedicated client portal is provided to centralize communication, project tracking, contractual documents, invoices, and approvals at every stage.

portal.title: Client portal
portal.description: Contracts, invoices, deliverables, and key project links, all grouped in a single client portal.

tracking.title: Transparent tracking
tracking.description: Clear milestones, regular updates, and centralized feedback to avoid back-and-forth.

validation.title: Timelines & milestones
validation.description: Validation checkpoints at every stage, along with a quality review before launch.

webDevelopment.title: Web Development
webDevelopment.contractDescription: After signing the contract and submitting a 50% deposit, I initiate the development of the website based on the agreed vision and defined elements, including typography, colors, and visual identity.
webDevelopment.developmentDescription: Development is carried out according to the validated specifications and project scope. The client portal is updated regularly to allow you to track progress. A first version is then delivered for review and quality assurance (QA).
webDevelopment.finalApprovalDescription: Once final approval is given and the website is ready to go live, I will send the remaining invoice. Upon receipt of payment, the website is deployed to the production environment.
webDevelopment.feedbackDescription: A feedback form will be sent to gather your thoughts on the experience. As a token of appreciation, I offer a discount on future projects as well as for any referrals.

webDesign.title: Web Design
webDesign.contractDescription: After signing the contract and submitting a 50% deposit, we begin the creative process with the creation of mood boards. These help define and align the visual direction of your brand or project, including typography, colors, and overall aesthetic.
webDesign.designDescription: I then create design variations, mockups, icons, and supporting visual elements. The client portal is updated regularly so you can follow progress and share feedback. Two rounds of revisions are included, with additional changes subject to an extra fee.
webDesign.finalApprovalDescription: After final approval, I will send the remaining invoice. Once payment is received, all files are organized and delivered via a Google Drive folder. Deliverables include PNG, JPG, and SVG formats, with additional formats available upon request.
webDesign.feedbackDescription: A feedback form will be shared to collect your experience and insights. As a gesture of appreciation, I offer a discount for future projects and referrals.

about.title: About me.
about.description:
Hey there! First of all, thanks for stopping by my website. I’m a web developer specialized in building high-performance, responsive interfaces, born and raised in France 🇫🇷 with roots in Benin 🇧🇯.

My journey began as a graphic designer, where I explored the limitless possibilities of visual expression. Over time, I naturally transitioned into web development, discovering the perfect balance between creativity and technical expertise.

In 2018, I moved to Canada 🇨🇦 as a temporary worker, driven by a strong sense of adventure. With time, I became a permanent resident and fully embraced the vibrant tech ecosystem of Montreal.

Throughout my career, I’ve worked with a wide range of companies as a freelancer, contractor, and employee, gaining valuable insight into diverse project requirements and team dynamics. These experiences have strengthened my adaptability and collaboration skills, allowing me to integrate seamlessly into teams and contribute meaningfully to their success.

Looking for a versatile and experienced Senior Front-End Developer ? Feel free to reach out, I’d be happy to build something great together.

– William
